scripts.dev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (err) { try { execSync('../.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (err2) { execSync('python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } }"
